response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist with genuine developer-tooling interest — including direct IDE development experience on NI LabWindows/CVI and authorship of test runners and assertion libraries — but the core stack requirements are largely unmet. Java appears only as a secondary skill in older roles, there is no Kotlin or Spring/enterprise-framework experience, and no evidence of deep JVM expertise, which are the non-negotiable qualifications for this role.
strengths: Hands-on IDE internals experience (C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI)
Strong developer-tooling track record (test runners, assertion libraries, MCP code generators)
Broad senior experience across systems, high-throughput services, and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/enterprise-framework experience
Java exposure is minor and dated; no demonstrated deep JVM knowledge
Recent career centered on TypeScript/Node and DLang, far from the JVM ecosystem

key_factors.factor: No Spring or enterprise framework background
